ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), AND ( ISBLANK( BillingCountry ), $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false, OR (RecordType.Name = "Distributor", RecordType.Name = "Prospect", RecordType.Name = "Third Party") ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please inform at least the main country code for the company
